name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Give me a chance to explain why this could be a big year for Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
Today, Medicare for all is supported by a majority of Americans and the bill has 16 co-sponsors in the Senate.
#
Friends -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to support Bernie's effort to make Medicare for all the law of the land in this country. I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this request is so important.
It was not that long ago that the idea of Medicare for all was dismissed and ridiculed by the corporate media and the political establishment of this country.
When Bernie first introduced the legislation in the Senate, not a single Senator signed on as a co-sponsor.
Today, the idea is supported by a majority of Americans and the bill has 16 co-sponsors in the Senate.
How did that happen? Well, in a word... it was you.
It happened because of our presidential campaign. It happened because of every single one of the record number of donations we received. It happened because of every door knocked and phone call made by a volunteer. It happened because of the million people who signed petitions in support of Bernie's bill.
That got us to where we are today. But if we're to get to the place where health care is actually a right for every man, woman and child in this country, we can't stop now. We have to turn up the heat even higher, and Bernie needs your help to do it:
**[Make a $3 donation today to help us re-launch our national grassroots organizing campaign with a focus on expanding support for Medicare for all in Congress, state legislatures, and local governments all across the country. We're going to organize in communities everywhere, and then we are going to win.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-mfa-org?refcode=em180415-t1-g "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-mfa-org?refcode=em180415-t1-g")**
Here is the truth, the insurance companies and the drug companies in this country are extraordinarily powerful and will not go down without a fight. They have obscene amounts of wealth and use that money to protect a dysfunctional system.
But 2018 is our year. We've made great progress against overwhelming odds already, and if we keep organizing, we are going to be unstoppable in this fight.
Thanks for chipping in.
Jeff Weaver

****[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-mfa-org?refcode=em180415-t1-g "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-mfa-org?refcode=em180415-t1-g")****
** **

name: DNC Headquarters
subject: [SURVEY] Share your thoughts, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
We wanted to touch base and get your thoughts on the direction of the Democratic Party.
---
Hello, Derek -- I'm Sean, the DNC's Community Management Director.

My team is dedicated to listening to supporters across online and offline channels, and then responding to your concerns, questions, and feedback. We're the ear of the party, providing a direct channel for communication between grassroots supporters and DNC staff.

**I wanted to touch base and get your thoughts on the direction of the Democratic Party. Will you take a few moments to complete our brief survey?**

**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522bc3/4067b0a/5d7e0549e/7e41ed5a/2989932362/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/survey-nd?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+TAKE+THE+SURVEY&utm_campaign=em_20180415_sk_nd&source=em_20180415_sk_nd&refcode=em_20180415_sk_nd")**
By providing your input, you're helping the DNC know what is working well, as well as what areas you think need improvement. It's also an opportunity for you to share how you plan to be involved during this critical election year.

shooting.

Peter,
Gov. Kasich held a press
availability on Tuesday discussing Ohio's gun violence reduction
bills, joined by Fred Guttenberg, father of Jaime Guttenberg, a
victim of the Parkland High School shooting. Watch (here)
Governor Kasich commemorated the
Holocaust at the Ohio Statehouse Holocaust & Liberators Memorial
this past Thursday. Emotional testimonials from both a liberator
and survivor allowed for a special final event at the memorial
site Gov. Kasich helped champion beginning in 2011. Watch (here)

Gov John Kasich released the
following statements this weekend:

The recent military action in
Syria:

"Americans should welcome
President Trump's joint action with the United Kingdom and France
in punishing the Syrian regime in order to uphold the global
prohibition on chemical weapons use.

Russia must understand that it
will not be allowed to shield the Syrian regime and that, no
matter how long it takes, all parties responsible for chemical
weapons attacks in Syria will ultimately be held to account."

-View on Twitter-
-View on Facebook-

failing health of former First Lady Barbara Bush:

"Barbara Bush is a woman of

our prayers."

-View on Twitter-

name: Joe Manchin
subject: share your story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
I'll be blunt: Washington isn't working for millions of Americans. |
---
[](https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/m/49819eb8/2efbf85c/62095eb5/4c9256f7/1088693937/VEsH/ "http://www.joemanchinwv.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180415&source=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180415&refcode=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180415")

Friend,

Political point-scoring and partisan gridlock in Washington continue hurting hardworking families in West Virginia and around the country.

Millions of Americans can't afford health insurance. Working families are struggling to make ends meet.

Washington is on a spending binge, borrowing money hand-over-fist, racking up huge deficits. But important priorities like repairing our disintegrating roads and crumbling bridges are on the back-burner because of political squabbling.

**I 'll be blunt: Washington isn't working for millions of Americans.**

[**_I 'm asking you to let me know how Washington gridlock and partisanship has affected you and your family. Share your story here._**](https://secure.joemanchinwv. "https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/s/share-your-story?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=24701&city=Bluefield&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=2+-+Irsquom+asking+you+to+let+me+know+how+Wa&utm_campaign=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180415&source=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180415&refcode=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180415")

I know you are with me in believing that political leaders in Washington ought to be spending their time finding common ground for real solutions to the challenges we're all facing.

I've been working hard night and day to put aside petty political grandstanding and remain focused on doing what's right for West Virginia. **I know we can solve our problems by working together.**

Of course, I have the advantage of representing West Virginians -- we're certainly not shy about voicing our concerns.

[**_That 's why I'm asking you to please take a moment and share your story with me if Washington gridlock is affecting you or your family._**](https://secure.joemanchinwv. "https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/s/share-your-story?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=24701&city=Bluefield&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=3+-+Thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+asking+you+to+ple&utm_campaign=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180415&source=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180415&refcode=JM_EM_EN_180DO_180415")

Working together in Washington means significant progress for West Virginia. That's my continuing commitment.

Thanks for sharing your story.

Joe |

|
---

subject: We've been met with silence so far
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3112/9e00690/440f760c/24027d73/3088691902/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180415_debate1_fnd_gq_ful__TG&source=em18_180415_debate1_fnd_gq_ful__TG")
Friends,

Last October, we knew it was time for voters to hear from all of us on the issues that matter most. So, we challenged our fellow Democratic campaigns to debates across our state and we were met with nothing but silence.

**Until now.**

This Wednesday, Andrew and the rest of Florida's Democratic candidates for Governor will hold their first debate in Tampa, and our campaign will have another opportunity to show everyone just what kind of leadership Florida deserves.

Andrew's bold, true progressive platform has already turned up the heat in this race. And with about four months until the primary election, people will say anything to discredit and dismiss Andrew's progressive, proven track record -- so that's where you step in.
